passes.title_raw: American Repertory Theater at Harvard University
passes.museum_name: American Repertory Theater at Harvard University
passes.benefits_text: 617-547-8300 SELECT SHOWS - The A.R.T. makes passes available to select performances of select shows. Availability will be determined 30 days before the start of each performance's run. Next show: Black Swan , May 29 - June 28, 2026 Each pass admits 2 people for free for either a Friday 7:30 pm performance or a Sunday 2:00 pm performance. After booking, you will receive an email confirmation with instructions on how to c ontact A.R.T. Ticket Services for your electronic tickets. Please note that you must contact them no later than 5:00 pm two days before your selected performance . NOTE: Black Swan is recommended for at least ages 14 and older and has content warnings for self-injury/harm, sex, haze, flashing lights/strobe, and loud sudden noises. For more information, please visit: https://americanrepertorytheater.org/shows-events/black-swan/ Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free
passes.link_name: American Repertory Theater at Harvard University

passes.benefits_text: 617-367-2345 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 1 adult or 1 child for free. Visit www.bostonbyfoot.org to browse Boston By Foot's extensive public tour calendar. Passes are valid for all public walking tours; they are not valid for private tours, water-based tours, or annual celebration tours ( Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail ). No passes are available at this time.
passes.label: Free

passes.benefits_text: 617-426-6500 Each pass admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person. Library Coupons are not valid for Sunday afternoons (Admission is $1 per person on Sundays from 1:30 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.). This pass is valid only on the date printed on the pass. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
866-307-2469 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off. Summer 2026 schedule: Spectacle Island Georges Island Peddocks Island No passes are available at this time.
passes.label: 50% off

passes.benefits_text: 617-621-3001 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 1 person for free. You must pick up your pass at the Main Library. 2026 Season Cruises daily May 22-September 7 Mon-Thurs at 12pm, 1:30pm and 3pm Fri-Sun at 12pm, 1:30pm, 3pm, and 4:30pm Cruises September 9-27 Wed-Thurs at 12pm, 1:30pm, and 3pm Fri-Sun at 12pm, 1:30pm, 3pm, and 4:30pm https://charlesriverboat.com/tours/charles-river-tours/ Upgrade to an Architecture Tour for an additional $15 per ticket. Payment will be collected at time of reservation by phone or in person. Cruises Friday, Saturday, Sunday only, May 22-September 6 at 9:30am Cruises Saturday and Sunday only, September 12-October 18 at 9:30am https://charlesriverboat.com/tours/architecture-cruises/ Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.

617-496-1638 Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Passes are valid for one-time use any day through the expiration date listed on the pass. Note: Harvard Museums of Science & Culture are free to Massachusetts residents every Sunday morning (year-round) from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm and on Wednesdays from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm. Proof of residency required. This offer is not available to commercial groups. Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.
passes.label: Free

passes.title_raw: How Do You See the World? Experience + Mapparium™
passes.museum_name: How Do You See the World? Experience + Mapparium™
passes.benefits_text: 617-450-7224 Each pass admits up to 4 adults free of charge to the Mapparium™ globe in the How Do You See the World? experience (value $6/Adult). Youth 17 and younger are always free. All other exhibits in the How Do You See the World? experience are always free, as are weekend church tours, and neither require a ticket. Pass instructions: Redeem this pass for tickets onsite in the Welcome Hall. Ticket reservations are not available ahead of time. All Mapparium showtimes are first come, first serve; this pass doesn't guarantee tickets for a specific time or day. This pass is only valid on the day of your visit. This pass does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to group visits. Void if altered or copied. No cash value. Print out this pass and bring it with you or display it on your phone. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.link_name: How Do You See the World? Experience + Mapparium™

passes.benefits_text: 617-478-3100 Each pass admits 2 people at $10 per person. People age 18 and under are admitted free. This pass is not date specific and may be used any time before the expiration date printed on the pass. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

617-566-1401 Each pass admits up to 4 adults at $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

617-725-0022 Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Children 4 years and younger are admitted for free. Pass instructions: Visit the museum’s website and use the library coupon code emailed to you to reserve a timed entry Presently, online reservations are required for all visitors. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free

passes.benefits_text: 800-440-6975 Each promo code may be redeemed for up to 2 adult tickets at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 youth ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are admitted free. Pass instructions: This pass is not date specific. It can be redeemed for discounted admission on any date. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

617-723-2500 Each pass admits 4 people free admission to the Exhibit Hall. Pass instructions: This coupon is valid only on the date printed on the pass. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free

passes.benefits_text: 617-973-5206 Each pass admits up to 4 people for 50% off. Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and is not valid for movie or whale watch tickets. NOTE: Starting May 26, this pass admits up to 4 people for $20 per person and is only valid on weekdays. This coupon is valid only on the date printed on the pass. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

781-396-9032 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 people for free for a 50 minute guided tour. Tours are at 1:00PM, 2:00PM, and 3:00PM. Visitors are invited to walk the grounds and view the exhibits before and after the tour. Children 12 and younger are admitted free. After reserving a library pass, you will receive an email confirmation with a promo code. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before the start of the tour and present your email confirmation with library promo code to the admissions desk staff. All tours are first come first served. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free

passes.benefits_text: 978-921-1944 SEASONAL PASS - Each pass admits 2 adults & children under 18 at the Family Level admission rate. Passes are not date specific and can be used once until the expiration date printed on the pass. Valid at more than 100 Trustees properties that collect an admission fee (including Fruitlands, deCordova and The Old Manse). Please note that some properties require pre-registration. Information about properties and advance registration available here: https://thetrustees.org/content/passes/ Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.

617-426-1812 Each pass allows free admission for up to 5 visitors per day. Limit one pass per party. Admission is first come first served, no advance tickets or reservations. Present printed pass or digital pass to Admissions. Valid only for the reserved date of visit. Ship is open Wednesday-Sunday 10am-4pm and closed Mondays and Tuesdays . Museum is open daily 10am-5pm. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
passes.label: Free

passes.address: One Franklin Park Road, Boston, MA, 02121
passes.benefits_text: 617-541-5466 Each pass admits up to 6 people to either the Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or the Stone Zoo (Stoneham) at a discounted rate of $9 per adult and $6 per child. Physical passes must be picked up from one of the library locations listed in the dropdown menu below. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.
